@graph.name: GLP-1 Injection Programme in Malaysia
@graph.description: GLP-1 injectable therapy is redefining medical weight loss. Nexus Clinic KL offers a personalised GLP-1 programme in Kuala Lumpur using Ozempic, Wegovy, and Mounjaro to reduce appetite, regulate blood sugar, and achieve sustainable results. Type 2 diabetes and weight management prescriptions available. Book your consultation.
